reforms.description: The government has permitted transfers to Investment Reserves from research and development funds, allowing for more flexible use of these funds after two years instead of five.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reform enhances the ability of firms and institutions to utilize R&D funds more effectively, potentially leading to increased innovation and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: Transfers to Investment Reserve permitted from research and development funds.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the management of R&D funds, allowing for greater flexibility and responsiveness to market needs.
reforms.source_quote: Transfers to Investment Reserve permitted from research and development funds and made freely disposable after two, instead of five, years.
